infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: VENTURE uses your camera to create content, live stream, and take profile photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VENTURE uses your microphone for live streaming and video creation.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: VENTURE accesses your photo library to share images and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: VENTURE saves content to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: VENTURE sends notifications for new followers, comments, and live streams.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VENTURE uses your location so you can tag where your posts were created.

plugins.cameraPermission: VENTURE uses your camera for content creation and live streaming.

plugins.photosPermission: VENTURE accesses your photo library to let you share photos and videos.
plugins.cameraPermission: VENTURE uses your camera to take photos and record videos for posting.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: VENTURE uses your location so you can tag where your posts were created.
